title: Creamy Moroccan Chicken Tagine
description: A umami-rich, creamy tagine featuring chicken stock concentrate for deep flavor and quick prep. Perfect for meal prepping with raw-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: chicken stock concentrate
ingredients.notes: use concentrated chicken stock for umami depth; store-bought or homemade

ingredients.name: chicken thighs
ingredients.notes: bone-in for flavor; cut into bite-sized pieces

ingredients.name: saffron threads
ingredients.notes: optional but authentic; steep in water first

instructions: Heat olive oil in a tagine or heavy pot over medium heat.
Sauté onion and garlic until soft (3-4 minutes).
Add chicken thighs and cook until browned (5-6 minutes).
Stir in tomato paste, cumin, ginger, turmeric, and saffron (if using).
Pour in chicken stock concentrate and 1 cup water; bring to a simmer.
Cover and cook on low heat for 20 minutes until chicken is tender.
Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve warm with rice or crusty bread.
